01-01.title: Create plugin package files
01-01.description: Create plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json, plugin/hooks/hooks.json, and plugin/.mcp.json with correct metadata, 6 async HTTP hooks, and MCP server definition.
acceptance_criteria: plugin.json contains name 'norbert' and version matching package.json
hooks.json defines exactly 6 hooks, all async HTTP to localhost:3748
.mcp.json defines norbert server with stdio transport, command norbert-cc
All hook URLs use port matching HOOK_PORT domain constant (3748)
Hook event names match HOOK_EVENT_NAMES domain constant
architectural_constraints: Port 3748 is shared artifact -- must match domain constant
Event names derived from HOOK_EVENT_NAMES -- single source of truth

02-01.title: Remove settings merge from startup and adapters
02-01.description: Remove run_settings_merge() call from .setup(), delete SettingsMergeAdapter, SettingsManager port, settings adapter module, and all settings merge domain functions. Keep HOOK_EVENT_NAMES, HOOK_PORT, build_hook_url, parse_event_type.
acceptance_criteria: No reference to SettingsMergeAdapter exists in codebase
No reference to run_settings_merge exists in codebase
No reference to SettingsManager port trait exists in codebase
App compiles and all remaining tests pass
HOOK_EVENT_NAMES and HOOK_PORT constants still present
architectural_constraints: Domain functions used by sidecar must NOT be removed
build_hook_url preserved -- used by plugin validation

02-02.title: Supersede ADR-006 and remove settings merge domain functions
02-02.description: Remove merge_hooks_into_config, hooks_are_merged, build_hooks_only_config, build_hook_entry, build_hooks_object, build_merged_config, build_merged_hooks, MergeOutcome. Update ADR-006 status to Superseded.
acceptance_criteria: None of the settings merge domain functions exist in codebase
MergeOutcome type removed
ADR-006 status reads 'Superseded' with reference to plugin framework
All remaining tests pass

03-01.title: 'No plugin connected' status and empty state UI
03-01.description: Add 'No plugin connected' status when session_count=0 AND event_count=0. Replace restart banner with plugin install hint card. Remove shouldShowRestartBanner and bannerWasShown state.
acceptance_criteria: App displays 'No plugin connected' when no events ever received
Plugin install command displayed prominently in empty state
No restart banner or shouldShowRestartBanner function in codebase
Status transitions to 'Listening' when events arrive (no restart needed)
Historical sessions browsable without active plugin
architectural_constraints: Status derivation remains pure function in domain layer
Plugin install command string is shared artifact -- single source

03-02.title: Postinstall terminal output with plugin hint
03-02.description: Add plugin install command to terminal output after successful binary download. Show clear two-step guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Terminal output includes 'To connect to Claude Code:' after install
Terminal output includes '/plugin install norbert@pmvanev-marketplace'
No settings merge or restart message in terminal output

quality_gates: No SettingsMergeAdapter, SettingsManager, or merge functions in codebase
Plugin files pass schema validation for Claude framework
App compiles and all tests pass after all removals
Sidecar still binds to port 3748 and accepts all 6 event types
Empty state UI shows plugin install guidance, not error state
